failures: crownCarry has broad hard advantages but few hard predators (6 prey, 0 predators)
fireBurst has broad hard advantages but few hard predators (5 prey, 0 predators)

ecology.rule: In deterministic combat, 0/100 is acceptable when the winner has clear cost, clear predators, and causal explanation. Review all-rounders and preyless weak presets first.
reviewItems: 王冠核心 all-rounder-risk: prey 6, predators 0
余烬爆燃 all-rounder-risk: prey 5, predators 0

reasons.detail: 优势方普攻占自身输出约 100%。

reasons.label: 弱势方反制资源不足
reasons.detail: 弱势方反制资源/优势方伤害约 24%。

extremes.headline: 治疗/护盾资源差距过大 + 总伤害碾压

reasons.label: 状态铺垫过快
reasons.detail: 优势方平均铺设状态层数约 57.6。

reasons.label: 治疗/护盾资源差距过大
reasons.detail: 优势方治疗+护盾约为弱势方 2.18 倍。

reasons.label: 2秒峰值爆发过强
reasons.detail: 优势方 2 秒峰值约为弱势方 1.51 倍。

reasons.label: 总伤害碾压
reasons.detail: 优势方总伤害约为弱势方 1.27 倍。

reasons.label: DOT/异常压力过高
reasons.detail: 优势方 DOT 占自身输出约 30%。
